title: pypptx thumbnails command
description: Non-runnable shared execution root for the thumbnails command feature. All concrete implementation, testing, documentation, and review work lives in children.
acceptance_criteria: `pypptx thumbnails deck.pptx` produces thumbnails.jpg containing a labeled grid of slide images
`pypptx thumbnails deck.pptx --cols 4 --output out` produces out.jpg with 4 columns
Decks exceeding cols × (cols + 1) slides produce multiple numbered grid files
Output is JSON {"files": [...]}; --plain prints one path per line
Missing Pillow prints `pip install 'pypptx[thumbnails]'` to stderr and exits non-zero
Missing soffice or pdftoppm prints install instructions to stderr and exits non-zero
